input.title: Daily briefing with memory context
input.text: Generate today's briefing using schedule, tasks, recent memories, and recommendation hints.

samples.good: Schedule blocks: protect the morning focus block. Recent memory: yesterday's focus drifted after lunch. Recommendation hint: front-load review work and keep one uninterrupted block.
samples.bad: Here is a generic update with tasks only. Memory context omitted. I will make a silent calendar write now.
